messages.text: Basket 1: a duck/bird-shaped wicker basket—rounded body with a small head sticking out on one side (with a little eye).
Placed it. Go to Basket 2.
Basket 2: a deep, round bucket-shaped wicker basket with a very dark brown thick arched handle and a lighter band around the rim.
Placed it. Go to Basket 3.
Basket 3: a rectangular picnic basket with a tall center handle and a hinged lid that’s flipped open to the right side.
Done. Go to Basket 4.
Basket 4: a pale tan/whitish oval wicker basket with a dark brown rim, and an arched handle that has little reddish/purple wrap accents near where it meets the sides.
Are the sides mostly very light/whitish with a darker brown band around the middle, or is it more uniformly pale?
Basket 4: the sides are mostly very light/whitish, with a distinct darker brown band around the middle (and a darker rim), plus those small reddish/purple wrap accents on the handle near the sides.
Placed it. Go to Basket 5.
Basket 5: a small squat rectangular wicker basket with a chunky twisted-rope handle and a darker brown rim—like a little market basket.
Is it the tight-weave rectangular basket with the thick braided handle (not the larger greenish rectangular one)?
Basket 5: yes—it's the tight-weave small rectangular basket with the thick braided handle and a dark brown rim (not the larger greenish rectangular one).
Placed it. Go to Basket 6
Basket 6: a round, lidded wicker basket shaped like a cat—cat face on top (eyes/whiskers) and little feet.
Done. Go to Basket 7
Basket 7: a rectangular wicker basket with a big arch handle, a green/teal woven body, and an orange-brown rim/handle with a scalloped trim along the top edge.
Placed it. Go to Basket 8
Basket 8: a dark gray/black oval wicker basket with a thick dark arched handle and a lighter tan band around the bottom.
Done. Go to Basket 9
Basket 9: a tall cylindrical wicker basket (like a small hamper) with two small loop handles near the top—no big arching handle.
Placed it. Go to Basket 10
Basket 10: a very shallow, wide round tray-like wicker basket with one arched handle and a clear spiral-coil pattern on the bottom.
Done. Go to Basket 11
Basket 11: a deep round tub-shaped wicker basket with two small loop handles on the sides (no big arch handle), with a diagonal/chevron weave and a darker band around the rim.
Placed it. Go to Basket 12.
Basket 12: a small brown handled basket with open slatted sides (vertical ribs) and a rounded-rectangle shape that pinches in slightly at the middle—single thick arch handle.
Does it have very visible vertical slats/ribs on the sides (almost see-through), rather than a plain woven oval with a tall thin handle?
Basket 12: yes—it's the one with very visible vertical slats/ribs and see-through gaps on the sides (not the plain tightly woven oval with a tall thin handle).
Done. Ready to submit.
